name: Functional - Successful CRM Quote Creation
description: Validates the end-to-end workflow for a successful CRM quote creation via the /crm/quote endpoint with all required fields present and valid.
input: POST /crm/quote with valid JSON body containing customerEmailId, receivedDateTime, and a valid lineItems array.
output: 200 OK with success: true and data containing status: PASS, quoteId, quoteOrderId, timestamps, and validationSummary.
success_criteria: No errors or missingInputs in response
